patterns.deps_struct: actionUpdateDeps R17 successor to var X=func
patterns.syscall_def: Defensible IFF (a)callee logs (b)best-effort doc (c)cleanup-defer w/primary (d)impossible-init. sg14a1 meets NONE
patterns.impl_defer_anti: defer fn(args) returning err discards. Fix: defer func(){_=fn()}()
patterns.tag_dup_anti: Pure-value decls duped across !js,!wasm should hoist untagged
patterns.panic_def: exemptions: sync.Once.Do funcLit, BUG: prefix, top-level init() no-receiver, doc 'panics on/if'. ENFORCED.
patterns.named_dur: Sleep in named time.Duration consts. APICallCooldown.
patterns.ci_enforce: cgo.yml:1040 POSITIVE selector LINTER_FLAGS="-X -test=false". R21: -errstringmatch -panicinlibrarycode -manualmutexunlock -osexitinlibrary -rawloginlib. Append flag for zero-violation analyzers. Refactor first for non-zero.
patterns.type_assert_safe: Safe single-value .(T): sync.Map/Pool cbs, post-literal-ctor, pass.ResultOf, type-switch. Else need ,ok.
patterns.manual_unlock_anti: Lock+manual Unlock leaks on panic. ENFORCED R21. Loop-body manual unlock would need //nolint.
patterns.zero_violation_enforce_R20_R21: Registered analyzer with zero prod violations = free enforcement. R21 pattern proven: sg19a1 16-site refactor + sg20a1 zero-vio both ENFORCED via single PR. Next: sg21a2 fileclosenotdeferred zero-vio ready.
patterns.cancel_defer_loop_anti: Sequential context.WithTimeout+manual cancel (not in loop) is clean refactor target. In-loop manual cancel is defensible to bound per-iter timeout, needs //nolint:contextcancelnotdeferred.

bash_policy: Sandbox blocks multi-stmt, mkdir/ls/find/wc/cat outside repo. Compound 'mkdir && ls' split-checked. go build blocked. gh CLI v2.83.0 'Malformed version:' on stderr with --json/--state on `gh issue list` — use `gh api search/issues?q=...`. Glob/Read on /tmp WORKS even when bash blocked. Write tool works to /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory/. safeoutputs JSON stdin via `. < file.json`. R20: create-issue.expires:7d auto-closes sergo trackers. R21: completed-state-close happens within hours when fix lands (#35130/#35131).
